description: Vertical graphic styled like a vintage color postcard. The central image is the Statue of Liberty on its stone pedestal against a pale blue sky, with an early-twentieth-century rigid airship (zeppelin) drawn flying above and behind the statue. Dark serif text at upper right reads 'SECURE AMERICA'S FUTURE' with smaller italic text below reading 'USCIS.GOV/JOIN'. The image has a faded, aged print appearance.
